public.error_logs.name: error_logs
public.error_logs.comment: Error tracking table for monitoring and debugging critical system errors

columns.name: error_type
columns.comment: Type of error (DI_GENERATOR, ROLE_ENUM, SCHEMA_MISMATCH, etc.)

columns.name: stack_trace
columns.comment: Full stack trace of the error (optional)

columns.name: context
columns.comment: Additional context data as JSON (request info, user data, etc.)

columns.name: count
columns.comment: Number of times this error has occurred (for deduplication)

columns.name: first_seen
columns.comment: When this error was first encountered

columns.name: last_seen
columns.comment: When this error was last encountered

columns.name: resolved
columns.comment: Whether this error has been resolved

columns.name: severity
columns.comment: Error severity level (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL)

public.quiz_daily_activity_summary.name: quiz_daily_activity_summary
public.quiz_daily_activity_summary.definition:
SELECT date(started_at) AS activity_date,
    count(DISTINCT patient_id) AS unique_patients,
    count(id) AS total_sessions_started,
    count(id) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS sessions_completed,
    count(id) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'cancelled'::text)) AS sessions_cancelled,
    count(DISTINCT quiz_template_id) AS unique_templates_used,
    avg(score) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS avg_score,
    avg(time_spent_seconds) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS avg_time_seconds,
    round((((count(id) FILTER (WHERE ((status)::text = 'completed'::text)))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(id), 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS completion_rate_percent
   FROM quiz_sessions qs
  GROUP BY (date(started_at));

public.quiz_patient_engagement_stats.name: quiz_patient_engagement_stats
public.quiz_patient_engagement_stats.definition:
SELECT p.id AS patient_id,
    p.name AS patient_name,
    count(qs.id) AS total_sessions,
    count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS completed_sessions,
    count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'started'::text)) AS active_sessions,
    avg(qs.score) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS avg_score,
    avg(qs.time_spent_seconds) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS avg_completion_time_seconds,
    max(qs.started_at) AS last_session_at,
    count(DISTINCT qs.quiz_template_id) AS unique_templates_attempted,
    round((((count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(qs.id), 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS completion_rate_percent
   FROM (patients p
     LEFT JOIN quiz_sessions qs ON ((p.id = qs.patient_id)))
  GROUP BY p.id, p.name;

public.quiz_patient_latest_responses.name: quiz_patient_latest_responses
public.quiz_patient_latest_responses.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (patient_id, quiz_template_id, question_id) patient_id,
    quiz_template_id,
    question_id,
    response_value,
    responded_at
   FROM quiz_responses
  ORDER BY patient_id, quiz_template_id, question_id, responded_at DESC;

public.quiz_template_performance_metrics.name: quiz_template_performance_metrics
public.quiz_template_performance_metrics.definition:
SELECT qt.id AS template_id,
    qt.name AS template_name,
    qt.category,
    count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE (((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text) AND (qs.started_at >= (now() - '30 days'::interval)))) AS completions_last_30d,
    count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE (((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text) AND (qs.started_at >= (now() - '7 days'::interval)))) AS completions_last_7d,
    avg(qs.score) FILTER (WHERE (((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text) AND (qs.started_at >= (now() - '30 days'::interval)))) AS avg_score_30d,
    avg(qs.time_spent_seconds) FILTER (WHERE (((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text) AND (qs.started_at >= (now() - '30 days'::interval)))) AS avg_time_30d,
    round((((count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE (((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text) AND (qs.started_at >= (now() - '30 days'::interval)))))::numeric / (NULLIF(count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE (qs.started_at >= (now() - '30 days'::interval))), 0))::numeric) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS completion_rate_30d,
    count(DISTINCT qs.patient_id) FILTER (WHERE (qs.started_at >= (now() - '30 days'::interval))) AS unique_users_30d
   FROM (quiz_templates qt
     LEFT JOIN quiz_sessions qs ON ((qt.id = qs.quiz_template_id)))
  WHERE (qt.is_active = true)
  GROUP BY qt.id, qt.name, qt.category;

public.quiz_template_usage_stats.name: quiz_template_usage_stats
public.quiz_template_usage_stats.definition:
SELECT qt.id AS template_id,
    qt.name AS template_name,
    qt.version AS template_version,
    count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS completed_sessions,
    count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'started'::text)) AS active_sessions,
    count(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'cancelled'::text)) AS cancelled_sessions,
    avg(qs.score) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS avg_score,
    max(qs.score) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS max_score,
    min(qs.score) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS min_score,
    avg(qs.time_spent_seconds) FILTER (WHERE ((qs.status)::text = 'completed'::text)) AS avg_time_seconds,
    count(DISTINCT qs.patient_id) AS unique_patients,
    max(qs.started_at) AS last_used_at
   FROM (quiz_templates qt
     LEFT JOIN quiz_sessions qs ON ((qt.id = qs.quiz_template_id)))
  GROUP BY qt.id, qt.name, qt.version;
